scripts.build-front:ci: yarn workspace konsti-client build:ci && yarn copy-front
scripts.build-front:dev: yarn workspace konsti-client build:dev && yarn copy-front
scripts.build-front:kube-dev: yarn workspace konsti-client build:kube-dev && yarn copy-front
scripts.build-front:prod: yarn workspace konsti-client build:prod && yarn copy-front
scripts.build-front:staging: yarn workspace konsti-client build:staging && yarn copy-front
scripts.playwright: yarn docker:db && npm-run-all --parallel server:test client playwright:install
scripts.playwright:install: npx playwright install && npx playwright test --ui --config ./playwright/
scripts.docker-compose:start: APP_SETTINGS=dev docker buildx build . --file Dockerfile --build-arg env=dev --tag server:latest --load && APP_SETTINGS=dev docker compose -f ./docker/docker-compose.yml up --detach --remove-orphans
scripts.docker-compose:test: APP_SETTINGS=ci docker buildx build . --file Dockerfile --build-arg env=ci --tag server:latest --load && APP_SETTINGS=ci docker compose -f ./docker/docker-compose.yml -f ./playwright/docker-compose.yml up --attach playwright --remove-orphans --exit-code-from playwright --abort-on-container-exit
scripts.lint: yarn eslint && yarn stylelint && yarn prettier:check
scripts.populate-db:kompassi: yarn workspace konsti-server generate-data --clean && yarn workspace konsti-server update-kompassi-data && yarn workspace konsti-server generate-data --users --admin --lotterySignups --eventLog
scripts.populate-db:event: yarn workspace konsti-server generate-data --clean && yarn workspace konsti-server load-past-event-data && yarn workspace konsti-server generate-data --users --admin --lotterySignups --eventLog
scripts.start:dev: yarn workspace konsti-server docker:db && npm-run-all --parallel server client
